narrative: A Senior Applied Scientist from Swiggy, bringing 5 years of experience, ranks #3 primarily due to their strong JD-relevant skill match for our Senior AI/ML Engineer role. Their verified skill depth in Information Retrieval Systems, Content Matching, and Search & Discovery, alongside experience at a product-first company, aligns exceptionally well with our Search & Retrieval focus. Their experience level alignment is ideal. While currently based in Indore, their availability and location fit for Pune/Noida would need confirmation. Minor profile credibility concerns were flagged during initial screening.
